1.title: Auth Provider Configuration
1.instruction: Select the OAuth provider(s), define required scopes, register redirect URIs, and outline how secrets/client IDs are loaded via environment config for each environment (dev/stage/prod).

2.title: OAuth Callback Endpoint
2.instruction: Implement the callback route to validate state/nonce, handle provider error codes, and receive the authorization code securely. Include logging for failures and metrics for success/error counts.

3.title: Token Exchange & Session Issuance
3.instruction: Exchange the authorization code for tokens, validate ID token claims, and create the user session (cookie or token-based). Handle token refresh/expiry and persist minimal identity info needed downstream.

4.title: User Linking & Account Rules
4.instruction: Define how new users are created vs. existing accounts are linked (by email or provider ID), conflict resolution rules, and what happens when required profile fields are missing.

5.title: Frontend Login Entry Point
5.instruction: Add the login button/entry point, initiate the OAuth redirect with CSRF protection, surface provider errors to the user, and confirm success state post-redirect. Include loading/error UX states.
